attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  RANK() OVER(ORDER BY WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT, WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD) + SMDNRTFRKEY.MAX_VAL DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY  ,
  WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  ,
  WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD ,
  USER ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)              
  FROM 
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SMDNRTFR ) SMDNRTFRKEY,  
  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_MERK_CG  WDNRTFR
  WHERE 
  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR 
    WHERE WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD
    AND WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT )

SELECT 
     WDRT.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  ,
     WDRT.BK_SS_CD      ,
     NRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY   ,
     /*CASE WHEN NRT.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN -7777 ELSE NRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  
     CASE WHEN NRT.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN -6666 ELSE NRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, */    
     NRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
     NRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     NRT.OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
     NRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
     NRT.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
     NRT.ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD    ,
     NRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     FROM 
     $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERK_MERGE_CG WDRT
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NRT
     ON WDRT.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY

SELECT

  WDNRXM.BK_SS_CD,
  WDNRXM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
  WDNRXM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,

  WDNRXM.GL_DTM,
  WDNRXM.GL_POSTED_DTM ,
  WDNRXM.RULE_START_DTM,

  WDNRXM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,

  WDNRXM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
  WDNRXM.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE,
  WDNRXM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
  WDNRXM.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
  WDNRXM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDNRXM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDNRXM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  WDNRXOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /* OA Q1FY15 */
  WDNRXOA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
  WDNRXM.AR_TRX_KEY,

  WDNRXM.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
  WDNRXM.PRODUCT_KEY ,
  WDNRXM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
  WDNRXM.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
  WDNRXM.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG ,
  WDNRXM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG ,
  WDNRXM.DV_MISC_FLG ,
  WDNRXM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,
  WDNRXM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG ,
  WDNRXM.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
  WDNRXM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
  WDNRXM.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
  WDNRXM.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
  WDNRXM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
  WDNRXM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
  WDNRXM.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG,
  WDNRXM.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
  WDNRXM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  WDNRXM.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM ,
  WDNRXM.SHIPPED_DT,
  WDNRXM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD ,
  WDNRXM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
  WDNRXM.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
  WDNRXM.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME ,
  WDNRXM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
  WDNRXM.MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
  WDNRXM.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
  WDNRXM.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  WDNRXM.SERVICE_TYPE_CD ,
  WDNRXM.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
  WDNRXM.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
  WDNRXM.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT ,
  WDNRXM.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD ,
  WDNRXM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
  WDNRXM.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  WDNRXM.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY ,
  WDNRXM.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ,
  WDNRXM.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
  WDNRXM.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  WDNRXM.SALES_REP_NUM ,
  WDNRXM.DV_FISCAL_DT,
  WDNRXM.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
 /*  CASE WHEN WDNRXM.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' THEN -7777 
       WHEN WDNRXM.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CDC' THEN -4444
    END RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY , */
  -7777 AS RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
  WDNRXM.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
  WDNRXM.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  WDNRXM.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
  WDNRXM.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,  
  WDNRXM.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  WDNRXM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  WDNRXM.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  WDNRXM.AMOUNT AS DV_TRX_AMT,
  WDNRXM.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DV_FUNC_AMT,
  WDNRXOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  WDNRXOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  WDNRXOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  WDNRXOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  WDNRXOA.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  WDNRXM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
  WDNRXOA.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
  WDNRXM.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  WDNRXM.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
  WDNRXM.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERK_MERGE_CG WDNRXM                         
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_MERK_OA WDNRXOA
  ON WDNRXOA.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRXM.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
  AND WDNRXOA.BK_SS_CD = WDNRXM.BK_SS_CD

SELECT 
    RANK() OVER(ORDER BY WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT, WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD) + SMDNRTFRKEY.MAX_VAL DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY  ,
    WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  ,
    WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD ,
    USER ,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)              
    FROM 
    (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
    FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SMDNRTFR ) SMDNRTFRKEY,   
    $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_REVB_MERK WDNRTFR
    WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR   
      WHERE WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD
      AND WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT )

     SDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
     WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD,
     WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
     WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,
     WDNRTFR.GL_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,

     CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED') THEN -7777 ELSE WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN -7777 ELSE WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
     WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
     WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG,
     /*WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,*/

     WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,

     WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,

     WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
     WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
     WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
     WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
     WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
     WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
     USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
     WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT,
     WDNRTFR.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
     (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1
      WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
      WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1
      ELSE WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
      END) RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
     WDNRTFR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
     WDNRTFR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
     /*CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='ACRL_INV' THEN 'INV' 
       WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='ACRL_REV' THEN 'REV'
    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
     END AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,*/
     WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
     WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
     WDNRTFR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ,
     WDNRTFR.DV_TRX_AMT,
     WDNRTFR.DV_FUNC_AMT,

     WDNRTFR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,

     'UNKNOWN' AS TSV_ACCRUALS_CD ,
     WDNRTFR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
	 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
     'I' AS DML_TYPE,
 WDNRTFR.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT as ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
	 WDNRTFR.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT as ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT	 
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_MERK_CG WDNRTFR
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR
      ON (WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
      AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD )
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX MERK
   ON WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=MERK.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_REV_CNTRT_NUM_MERK_CG WDRTCN
   ON (WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = WDRTCN.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT

     /*WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,*/
     WDRTCN.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,

  ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-47 FOR 1 )
  END ||
  CASE 
  WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-46 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
  THEN  '' 
  ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-46 FOR 1 )
  END  ||
  CASE 
  WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-45 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
  THEN  '' 
  ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-45 FOR 1 )
  END  ||
  CASE 
  WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-44 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
  THEN  '' 
  ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-44 FOR 1 )
  END ||
  CASE 
  WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-43 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
  THEN  '' 
  ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-43 FOR 1 )
